<!-- Describe the problem or limitation this feature addresses -->

<!-- Describe your proposed solution clearly -->

## Ethical Alignment

<!-- How does this feature align with ed2kIA's ethical AI principles? -->
- [ ] Promotes interpretability and transparency
- [ ] Respects decentralization and censorship resistance
- [ ] Does not introduce centralization vectors
- [ ] Considered privacy implications

## Network Impact

<!-- How will this feature impact the network? -->
- **Backwards Compatibility**: <!-- Will existing nodes need to upgrade? -->
- **Protocol Changes**: <!-- Does this require protocol modifications? -->
- **Performance Impact**: <!-- Expected impact on latency, bandwidth, memory -->
- **Phase Compatibility**: <!-- Which phases (1-6) are affected? -->

<!-- List any alternative solutions you've considered -->
